pr.title: Movers: deterministic catalyst, lazy cached read, plain catalyst labels
pr.body: ## Summary Reworks Movers catalyst so the **60s poll never calls the LLM or web search**. Catalyst **type** and **summary** are deterministic from FMP headlines. The **read** (plus posture and confidence) is fetched **on demand** when a row expands, with DB caching and optional web-search fallback. Also simplifies catalyst type UI: **plain uppercase white text** (no tinted fill, border, or per-type colors). ## Backend ### Poll path (no LLM / no web) - Keyword classifier in `@workspace/movers-types` (`MOVERS_CATALYST_KEYWORD_GROUPS`, tunable) - Types: GOV, ANALYST, CONTRACT, EARNINGS, MA, SECTOR, NONE - Summary = most recent FMP headline title; `newsKey` = hash of driving news ### Feed (`GET /api/movers`) - Situations include `catalystType`, `catalyst` (summary), `newsKey` only â€” **no read/posture/confidence** ### Lazy read (`GET /api/movers/read?id={situationId}`) - Cache hit on `movers_catalyst_cache` by `news_key` - Miss: FMP news context + Tavily/Serper fallback if news is thin â†’ LLM JSON (`read`, `posture`, `confidence`) â€” **context only, no tool search in LLM** - Prunes cache entries older than 7 days on write - Migration `0036_movers_catalyst_cache.sql` + boot `ensureMoversCatalystCacheTable` ## Frontend - **Catalyst type**: plain white uppercase labels (collapsed + expanded) - **Collapsed row**: ticker, price, % change, catalyst label, posture (`â€”` until read loads) - **Expand**: fetches `/api/movers/read`, loading state in read area, session cache for re-expand - **Movers settings**: Claude, Gemini, OpenAI only (no xAI) ## Verify - `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server typecheck` - `pnpm --filter @workspace/alpha-terminal typecheck` - `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server test -- src/lib/movers` - Poll produces type + headline without LLM; expand twice on same row â†’ second call uses cache ## Deploy - Redeploy **api-server** (migration `0036`, `FMP_API_KEY`, LLM keys, optional `TAVILY_API_KEY` for thin-news fallback) - Redeploy **alpha-terminal**
pr.author: achase1982-afk
